Lessons > 22. Activity: Working with Lists of Dictionaries from the Internet

Today we will continue practicing how to work with dictionary data representations and lists of dictionaries using Spotify’s REST API.

Today's Activities

For today, please do the following:

1. Download the Exercise Files
